name: Bill Cain Tennis Center
description: Bill Cain Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Darlington, SC. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Darlington Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Darlington Country Club in Darlington, SC! There are 4 outdoor clay and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, food, water, and lights.

name: Hartsville Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Hartsville Country Club in Hartsville, SC! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Lawton Park
description: Lawton Park is a place to play pickleball in Hartsville, SC. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: TB Thomas Sports Center
description: TB Thomas Sports Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hartsville, SC. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.
